analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs). The event.json indicates the topic is 'blackholes' and requires a theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos suggest the website is in development with CSS, HTML, and JS files needing completion. The current state shows a dark, cosmic theme is intended but not fully implemented.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
